title: Team Tracker Website with GenAI
description: Build a team tracker website using GenAI technology.
business_case_summary:
Business Case Summary: Team Tracker Website with GenAI (DEM-2026-0075)

Executive Summary  
This project aims to develop a Team Tracker website leveraging GenAI technology to enhance team management and productivity. The solution will provide real-time insights and smart analytics for better decision-making.

Business Value/Impact  
Implementing this tool will streamline team operations, improve resource allocation, and boost overall efficiency, resulting in increased customer satisfaction within the digital domain. The innovative use of GenAI positions the company as a leader in customer digital transformation.

Risk Mitigation  
Medium risk concerns will be managed through phased development, rigorous testing, and ongoing monitoring to ensure data security and system reliability. Stakeholder engagement and feedback loops will minimize adoption risks.
capacity_reasoning: Delivery team has 54% overall available capacity.

Constraint: Security Engineer has only 0 units available (requires 5).
Skill gap: Required skills GenAI, Web Development, Backend Development, Frontend Development are missing in the available workforce.
Earliest available start date is deferred by 30 days to 2026-08-09.
